raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declarative intention-setting to reframe relationship with effort, rest, and receptivity",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "ease, rest, clarity, and flow are states that can be permitted rather than achieved through effort or justification",
    "habitual effort-creation is a modifiable personal pattern rather than an external necessity",
    "life can 'meet' the speaker in a responsive way once internal resistance is released",
    "simplicity is an available default state obscured only by unnecessary mental activity"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a consistent set of parallel affirmations all oriented toward reducing self-imposed friction; no logical contradictions within its own premises",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker finds that repeatedly directing attention this way measurably reduces anxiety or over-effort without impairing necessary action or discernment",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the affirmations are used to justify avoidance of required effort, rationalization of inertia, or denial of external constraints that cannot be dissolved by internal permission alone"
}
